After action(['UP','UP','LEFT']) there are three entries -- first UP, second UP, then LEFT. All change within one entry's frames is that single action animating, never several actions. sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("Current frames:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['c', 'G', 'b'] and n['pixels'] > 10:
        print(f"  {n['color']}: boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\nPlayer:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N']:
        print(f"  {n['color']}: boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
